pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot starter parent from 2.6.3 to 3.3.4 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 to ensure compilation against the target JDK.
Remove the MongoDB starter dependency, likely switching to a different data persistence strategy or removing it entirely.
Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC to version 4.1.3 to maintain compatibility with Spring Boot 3.
Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for API documentation.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base Docker image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Replace Debian-based apt-get package installation with Alpine's apk package manager due to the base image change.
Install Maven explicitly via apk since the new base image does not include it.
Install Node.js using nvm to ensure a specific version compatible with the build process.
Install libstdc++ to satisfy native library dependencies required by the application or build tools.
Install git to support build-time configuration that relies on git metadata.
